release_notes: v1.6.0+18: Introduced Live Hardware Sensor Diagnostics dashboard with real-time stream graphs, 60+ FPS rate limiting, and robust hardware sensor enumeration.
features: New 'Live Hardware Sensor Diagnostics' feature in app drawer and tools menu.
Real-time streaming charts for 3D Motion, Environment, Pedometer, Proximity, and Orientation hardware sensors.
BETA sash indicator and fixed pinned header bar for seamless scrolling diagnostics.
Engineered 60+ FPS frame rate-limiting and microtask buffering for low-end Android hardware.
fixes: Hardened native Kotlin sensor event listeners against null pointer and float casting exceptions.
Optimized memory allocations by pre-allocating native double array buffers during sensor stream delivery.
